scripts.report:source-admission: pnpm --filter @vh/ai-engine build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --loader ../../tools/node/esm-resolve-loader.mjs dist/sourceAdmissionReport.js
scripts.report:source-health: pnpm --filter @vh/ai-engine build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --loader ../../tools/node/esm-resolve-loader.mjs dist/sourceHealthReport.js
scripts.check:source-health: pnpm --filter @vh/ai-engine build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && VH_NEWS_SOURCE_HEALTH_ENFORCE_RELEASE_EVIDENCE=1 node --loader ../../tools/node/esm-resolve-loader.mjs dist/sourceHealthReport.js
